title: Spatularia virginiensis
taxonomy: Spatularia virginiensis belongs to the family Orchidaceae and is classified as an orchid species. It is native to North America and is considered to be a terrestrial orchid. This species is relatively rare and is found in specific regions with suitable habitat conditions. Further classification would include its genus and species designations, as well as its specific rank within the botanical hierarchy. The classification of Spatularia virginiensis is continually subject to review and revision as new research and data become available.
